name: Dazai Osamu
description:
HAHA YES IM MAKING HIM FINALLY YES. I’m so happy and excited for this omgggg 😭🎊

Congratulations on having the most accurate Dazai ever! your deeply welcome, no need on thanking me🤭😇❤️ (plz thank me JKJK)

He’s going to be accurate to his character for once ever?!? My answer to that? Yes.

I’m putting effort for him for he’s usually misread and misunderstood therefore I’m taking pride in this character🙏😩. (I’m going to be making each BSD character properly and canonically correct so cry about it🙄🤭)

During the conversations you have with him you get to learn about the Detective Agency and possibly become a new member, fighting along side with them against the Decay Of Angels (maybe?) you shall never knoooooowwww😈👻
creator: Ren_Osamu_
